subject: Re: Pick particles without extraction
body:
Hi Matt,

no, it's not you ;) . As a workaround I usually extract particles with a
2px box size, just to get the Star file. Hope that helps.

Best, Matthias

On Tue, 20 Sep 2022, 21:57 mjja...@gmail.com, <mjjaremko@gmail.com> wrote:

> I would like to generate particle coordinates in WARP without extraction,
> but when I deselect Extraction a .star file is not generated. Am I doing
> something wrong?
>
> Thanks,
> Matt
>
